cases.prompt: write this week's 3P update for the platform team
expectations: Identifies the comm type as 3P update
Produces the update with Progress / Plans / Problems sections
Follows the newsletter format (sections, tone, length) from that guideline
Does NOT free-style its own structure

cases.prompt: answer this FAQ from the #support channel about our new pricing
expectations: Produces a concise FAQ-style answer per the guideline

cases.description: External press release does NOT trigger internal-comms
cases.prompt: draft a press release for our Series B announcement
expectations: Routes to a marketing/PR skill or a copywriting flow
Does NOT load internal guideline files

cases.description: Customer-facing email does NOT trigger internal-comms
cases.prompt: write an email to our customer explaining the outage
expectations: Uses an external comms / customer-communication approach
Does NOT load references/faq-answers.md as if internal
